name: ColorCalculator
description: Calculates colors for mesh volumes based on numerical values. Supports continuous gradients, fixed class count, or custom class boundaries. Generates legend geometry and renders it directly in the Rhino viewport.

inputParameters.name: valueTree
inputParameters.description: Tree of values for color mapping. One value per mesh.

inputParameters.name: colorGrad
inputParameters.description: Color gradient or list of colors (min 2, default: Ladybug gradient).

inputParameters.name: classCount
inputParameters.description: Number of classes (int, 0=continuous) OR list of class boundary floats e.g. [0,5,10].

inputParameters.name: legendCfg
inputParameters.description: Legend config as 'key: value' pairs (title, min, max, segments, decimals, vertical, seg_height, seg_width, text_height, scale, etc.).

inputParameters.name: legendPlane
inputParameters.description: Base plane for legend positioning (default: World XY)

outputParameters.name: colors
outputParameters.description: Tree of colors for each value (structure matches input values)

outputParameters.name: legendGeo
outputParameters.description: Legend gradient bar mesh (with vertex colors)

outputParameters.name: textLocations
outputParameters.description: Text anchor points (title first, then value labels)

outputParameters.name: textContents
outputParameters.description: Text strings (title first, then per legend bin)

outputParameters.name: stats
outputParameters.description: Statistical summary (min, max, mean, median, valid count)
